stories.title: Grades for both sides of the Giannis trade: Winner...
stories.summary: The Bucks sent star Giannis Antetokounmpo to Miami. Which side won the trade?

stories.title: Giannis traded to Heat: Everything we know about t...
stories.summary: How does Miami build around Giannis and Bam? What's next in Milwaukee? NBA insiders examine the move.

stories.title: Sources: Heat land Giannis in blockbuster trade
stories.summary: The Bucks are trading Giannis Antetokounmpo and Bobby Portis to the Heat for Tyler Herro, Kel'el Ware, Jaime Jaquez Jr., Kasparas Jakucionis, three first-round picks (including No. 13 in Tuesday's draft), one pick swap and one second-rounder, per sources.

stories.title: Blazers hiring Wolves' Nori as coach, sources say
stories.summary: The Trail Blazers have hired Micah Nori as the team's new head coach. Nori has spent the past five seasons as an assistant coach for the Wolves.

stories.title: Cops look at battery claim against Jets QB Smith
stories.summary: Jets quarterback Geno Smith is being investigated by police for an incident in which a woman accused him of battery.
